description_long: This object consists of three distinct storage boxes, each with a weathered and utilitarian appearance, suitable for urban environments. The leftmost box is greenish with visible rust stains and metal fasteners, suggesting a metal construction exposed to the elements. The central box has a whitewashed, wooden plank texture, with visible grain and seams, indicating it is made of aged wood. The rightmost box is tan with brown rust marks, tape, and black printed symbols, resembling a cardboard or metal box used for shipping or storage. All three boxes are cubic in shape and show signs of wear, such as stains, rust, and surface abrasions, indicating prolonged outdoor or industrial use. The surfaces are generally matte to rough, with some areas of discoloration and grime. These boxes are likely used for storage or transport of goods in garages, warehouses, or outdoor urban settings.
description: A set of three weathered, cubic storage boxes made of metal, wood, and possibly cardboard, each showing signs of rust, stains, and urban wear.
description_view_0: Three storage boxes side by side: left is green and rusted, center is whitewashed wood, right is tan with tape and stains.
description_view_1: Boxes aligned front to back: tan box in front, whitewashed wood in the middle, green rusted box at the back.
description_view_2: Three boxes side by side from the opposite side: tan box left, whitewashed wood center, green rusted box right.
description_view_3: Boxes aligned front to back: green rusted box in front, whitewashed wood in the middle, tan box at the back.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area, adhesive label, no labeling
